calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 613

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Andrew Y S Cheng; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by For the Record (10:01am-10:09am) (613)

George Aposhian, Esq., appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff, Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Defaulted defendant Bayview Renovation & Development Inc. et al did not appear.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Mr. Aposhian testifies on behalf of Plaintiff.
Witness Kevin Iwahashi, appearing via Zoom, is sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $64,330.01
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,498.45
Attorney's Fees: $ 1200.00
Costs: $ 615.31
Total Judgment in the amount of $70,643.77
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
